antiCv.system:
Expert LaTeX developer creating entertaining anti-CV documents.

CONSTRAINTS: GitHub Actions compilation, zero errors, standard packages.
ANTI-CV CONCEPT: Humorous failures, rejections, mistakes + lessons learned.
TARGET LENGTH: Exactly 2 pages - comprehensive but not overwhelming.
OUTPUT: Complete LaTeX code only, no explanations.
antiCv.fullRebuild:
Create entertaining anti-CV from career data. Focus on failures, rejections, things that went wrong + lessons learned. Be creative and humorous while professional.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Target exactly 2 pages in length
- Use all major career experiences
- Include detailed technical failures and lessons learned
- Add personal projects and career breaks
- Expand on educational journey and challenges

Career data:
```markdown
{{CAREER_DATA}}
```

Transform achievements into amusing failure stories and learning experiences. Ensure comprehensive 2-page coverage.
antiCv.incremental:
Fix LaTeX errors and apply updates to this anti-CV. Keep the humorous tone and creative approach.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Maintain exactly 2 pages in length
- Adjust content density as needed
- Preserve all essential sections

Current anti-CV:
```latex
{{CURRENT_CV}}
```

Updates to integrate:
```diff
{{DIFF_DATA}}
```

Fix compilation errors, apply valuable updates while maintaining entertaining anti-CV style and 2-page target length.

_future_example._comment: Future CV types can be added like this:

professionalCv.system: Expert LaTeX developer creating professional CV documents...
professionalCv.fullRebuild: Create professional CV from career data...
